productDisplayName: Carlton London Men Casual Beige Casual Shoes
description: Designed for that man with extraordinary style, these suede mocassins from carlton london are perfect downtime accessories for winter weekends. The suede leather upper and tonal stitch detailing enhances your style statement. Pair this with a T-shirt and trousers for unparalleled cool.UpperSuede leather upper with wrapround lacing that can be tied up on the midfoot for customised comfort and styleSlip-on style for ease of wearFabric inner lining for all-day, sweat-free comfortPadded and fabric lined footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs for absolute grip and tractionshoe careDust the upper using a nubuck brushDo not store in direct sunlight
